title: Java Full Stack Career Path
description: Structured curriculum career path for learning Java Full Stack Career Path.

title: Variables in Java
description: Understand how data is declared, stored, and retrieved in JVM memory using variables.

title: Two Sum Using HashMap
description: Coding practice problem: Two Sum Using HashMap. Target topic: Arrays.

title: Personal Developer Portfolio Website
description: Design and build a fully responsive personal portfolio site using React, showcasing your projects, skills, and contact details. Incorporate smooth animations, dark mode, and deploy to GitHub Pages.

title: Task Manager REST API
description: Build a full-stack Task Manager application — a Spring Boot REST API backend connected to a React frontend. Users can create, assign, prioritize, and track tasks with deadlines, with full CRUD operations and JSON API responses.

title: Library Management System
description: Build a console-based Java application that manages a library catalogue — books, members, borrowing records, and search. Apply core OOP, Java Collections, file I/O, and exception handling in a real use case.

description: The complete journey from Java basics to full-stack cloud-native deployment.

title: Modern Frontend Developer Roadmap
description: Deep dive into web standards, performance, React components, and state management.

title: Junior Frontend Engineer Resume Template
description: Tailored for frontend developers focusing on UI development, performance, state management, and modern Web design.

title: Minimalist Developer Portfolio Template
description: Clean, elegant, typography-focused single-page portfolio layout.

title: Terminal/IDE Style Portfolio Template
description: Interactive developer portfolio designed to resemble an IDE workspace or Linux command terminal.
